Package de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Class AbstractUserInterfaceControl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractUserInterfaceControl
All Implemented Interfaces:
UserInterfaceControl, ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProblemLoaderControl, ProverTaskListener, ProgressMonitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl, DefaultUserInterfaceControl
public abstract class AbstractUserInterfaceControl extends Object implements UserInterfaceControl, ProblemLoaderControl, ProverTaskListener
Provides a basic implementation of UserInterfaceControl.

    • fireTaskStarted

      protected void fireTaskStarted(TaskStartedInfo info)
      Fires the event ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo) to all listener.
      Parameters:
      info - the TaskStartedInfo containing general information about the task that is just about to start

    • fireTaskProgress

      public void taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo info)

    • taskProgress

      public void taskProgress(int position)
      Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
      Called when progress is made on a task. This method is called after every single step of the task
      Specified by:
      taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
      Parameters:
      position - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo).

    • taskFinished

      public void taskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo info)
      Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
      Called when a task is finished.
      Specified by:
      taskFinished in interface ProverTaskListener
      Parameters:
      info - a TaskFinishedInfo object with additional information

    • createProof

      public Proof createProof(InitConfig initConfig, ProofOblInput input) throws ProofInputException
      Instantiates a new Proof in this UserInterfaceControl for the given ProofOblInput based on the InitConfig.
      Specified by:
      createProof in interface UserInterfaceControl
      Parameters:
      initConfig - The InitConfig which provides the source code.
      input - The description of the Proof to instantiate.
      Returns:
      The instantiated Proof.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • createProofEnvironmentAndRegisterProof

      protected abstract ProofEnvironment createProofEnvironmentAndRegisterProof(ProofOblInput proofOblInput, ProofAggregate proofList, InitConfig initConfig)
      registers the proof aggregate at the UI
      Parameters:
      proofOblInput - the ProofOblInput
      proofList - the ProofAggregate
      initConfig - the InitConfig to be used
      Returns:
      the new ProofEnvironment where the ProofAggregate has been registered

    • load

      public AbstractProblemLoader load(Profile profile, File file, List<File> classPath, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes, Properties poPropertiesToForce, boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs, Consumer<Proof> callback) throws ProblemLoaderException

      Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.

      The loading is performed in the Thread of the caller!

      Specified by:
      load in interface UserInterfaceControl
      Parameters:
      profile - An optional Profile to use. If it is null the default profile AbstractProfile.getDefaultProfile() is used.
      file - The java file to open.
      classPath - The class path entries to use.
      bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
      includes - Optional includes to consider.
      poPropertiesToForce - Some optional Properties for the PO which extend or overwrite saved PO Properties.
      forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true AbstractProblemLoader.profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
      callback - receives the proof after it is loaded, but before it is replayed
      Returns:
      The opened AbstractProblemLoader.
      Throws:
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

    • createProblemInitializer

      protected ProblemInitializer createProblemInitializer(Profile profile)

      Creates a new ProblemInitializer instance which is configured for this UserInterfaceControl.

      This method is used by nearly all Eclipse based product that uses KeY.

      Parameters:
      profile - The Profile to use.
      Returns:
      The instantiated ProblemInitializer.

    • loadingStarted

      public void loadingStarted(AbstractProblemLoader loader)
      Description copied from interface: ProblemLoaderControl
      The loading has started.
      Specified by:
      loadingStarted in interface ProblemLoaderControl
      Parameters:
      loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.

    • loadingFinished

      public void loadingFinished(AbstractProblemLoader loader, IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer, ProofAggregate proofList, AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result) throws ProblemLoaderException
      Description copied from interface: ProblemLoaderControl
      The loading has stopped.
      Specified by:
      loadingFinished in interface ProblemLoaderControl
      Parameters:
      loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.
      poContainer - The loaded IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer.
      proofList - The created ProofAggregate.
      result - The occurred AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult.
      Throws:
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
